name: Toast
intent: 一時的な通知メッセージ。4タイプ（success/error/warning/info）。

success.tailwind: flex items-center gap-3 bg-emerald-50 border border-emerald-200 text-emerald-800 rounded-lg p-4

error.tailwind: flex items-center gap-3 bg-red-50 border border-red-200 text-red-800 rounded-lg p-4

warning.tailwind: flex items-center gap-3 bg-amber-50 border border-amber-200 text-amber-800 rounded-lg p-4

info.tailwind: flex items-center gap-3 bg-primary-50 border border-primary-200 text-primary-800 rounded-lg p-4

htmlSample: 保存しました
